name: food-up

scripts.start:dev: concurrently "npm run watch:shared" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" -n shared,server,web -c yellow,green,blue -p "[{name}]"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:web && npm run build:server

author: Predrag Stojković
description: App for managing food supply in companies
